title: Malty Gooey German Papelon Bake
description: A malty, gooey German dish featuring papelon, perfect for a crowd, baked on a cedar plank for a unique flavor, this low-fat-friendly dessert is sure to please.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the malt extract, papelon, and melted butter.
Add the low-fat milk and large eggs to the malt mixture, whisking until smooth.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, stirring until just combined.
Pour the batter onto a cedar plank lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 35 minutes, or until the edges are set and the center is still slightly gooey.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
